name: ev-charging-optimizer
description: EV charging schedule optimizer using real-time spot prices and grid carbon intensity. Hybrid mobile via Ionic + Angular, served by a Node/Express backend.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
